name: brreg-snap
description: Firefox-utvidelse som henter bedriftsinfo fra Brønnøysundregistrene med ett klikk.

scripts.dev:firefox: pnpm run build:firefox && web-ext run --source-dir dist-firefox
scripts.dev:chrome: pnpm run build:chrome && web-ext run -t chromium --source-dir dist-chrome
scripts.package:firefox: pnpm run build:firefox && web-ext build --source-dir dist-firefox --artifacts-dir web-ext-artifacts --overwrite-dest --ignore-files "**/*.map" "icons/README.md"
scripts.package:chrome: pnpm run build:chrome && web-ext build --source-dir dist-chrome --artifacts-dir web-ext-artifacts --filename "brreg-snap-chrome-{version}.zip" --overwrite-dest --ignore-files "**/*.map" "icons/README.md"
